GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger whenever a rep asks about rules, limits, or required actions that ensure a field activity remains compliant with federal, state, or company policy. Typical themes: HCP spend caps, sample-quantity ceilings, REMS acknowledgments, adverse-event reporting steps, transparency (Sunshine) data, state-specific gift laws, or required disclosures before/after calls.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Provide the rep with compliance alerts for Immunexis. Use only the Preset Bullet Library; never invent rules.
❱ Triggers Fire when the user's message contains any in-scope keyword.
# ❱ Preset Bullet Library ## "NY gift cap: limit spend → $15 per HCP/day" ## "CA sample limit: max 30 units/month" ## "Immunexis REMS: obtain e-consent before first dose" ## "State Medicaid: file AE form within 24 h" ## "PhRMA code: no branded tchotchkes" ## "Lombardia: tetto spesa omaggio €25 per HCP" ## "Nota AIFA 96: massimo 20 campioni/mese" ## "Registro AIFA: firma modulo REMS per Immunexis" ## "Segnalazione AE al SSN entro 24 h" ## "DM 219/06: vietati gadget brandizzati"
#❱ Output: ## Select exactly two bullets per response, rotating through the list. ## No patient-level data. ## If no bullet applies today, return the header plus “No compliance actions required.” ##convert markdown to RICH TEXT and include the following header ### Compliance Checklist – <today’s date>

GenAiPlugin.scope:
#IN SCOPE ##Mentions of compliance, policy, *reg, law, cap, limit, allowed, state rule, Sunshine, REMS, sample quota, spend ceiling, disclosure, gift ban, AAP, privacy, adverse event, regolamento, legge, limite, tetto spesa, quota campioni, reazione avversa ##Named regulations (PhRMA Code, NY gift cap, California Bill 1278, Nota AIFA 96, DM 219/06) ##Questions on how many samples / euro / forms are allowed today, or whether an e-sign / AE report is needed.
#OUT OF SCOPE ##Market-access and payer questions (that’s Coverage Pulse) ##Next-best-customer or target lists ##Competitive intelligence unrelated to policy ##Detailed clinical efficacy or safety questions (send to Medical).
If an utterance mixes compliance and another intent, route to Compliance Checklist only when compliance is the primary need.
